title: Journal figure-spec record
description: A single journal's figure/artwork requirements as consumed by marine-map-core's journals module. All linear dimensions are in millimetres; dpi values are dots per inch.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier; matches the record's filename (<id>.json) and its entry in index.json.

publisher.description: Publisher, optionally with the learned society the journal is published on behalf of.

canvas.description: Page geometry the figure must fit into, in millimetres.

single_column_mm.description: Width of a single-column figure in mm.

double_column_mm.description: Width of a full/double-column figure in mm.

max_height_mm.description: Maximum usable figure height (text area) in mm.

raster_dpi.description: Recommended raster resolutions by figure class, in dots per inch.

combination.description: Resolution for combination figures (line art over a raster, e.g. a map).

line.description: Resolution for pure line art / bitmap.

map_target.description: Concrete export target the engine should aim for when producing a marine map.

recommended_format.description: Preferred file format for a map figure.

recommended_dpi.description: Preferred export resolution for a raster map, in dpi.

formats_accepted.description: File formats the journal accepts for figures.

colour_mode.description: Colour space the journal expects for colour figures.

min_font_pt.description: Minimum in-figure label/font size in points at final printed size.

font_family_hint.description: Suggested font family/families for in-figure text.

notes.description: Free-text, publisher-specific guidance (caveats, widths, CMYK warnings, etc.).

source_url.description: Link to the authoritative author/figure-guidelines page the record is derived from.

last_verified.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the record was last checked against source_url, or the sentinel 'VERIFY-BEFORE-SHIP' to flag an unverified default.
